name: NiSource Inc Depositary Shares representing 1/1000th ownership interest in a share of 6.50% Series B Preferred Stock and 1/1000th ownership interest in a share of Series B-1 Preferred Stock
summary: NiSource Inc Depositary Shares represent ownership in a portion of the company's preferred stock. NiSource is a utility company providing natural gas and electricity to customers across several states. The depositary shares trade on the New York Stock Exchange.
